{{Expand}}

{{Infobox group
| name = Black Syndicate
| introduced = The Captain
}}

== The Captain ==
{{spoiler|book=lh-01-the-captain|The [[Black Syndicate]] uses cars and men in black suits to block streets.<ref name="lh-01-the-captain-c10">''The Captain'', chapter 10</ref>}}

== Notes ==
<references />

{{The Last Horizon nav}}

[[Category:Groups]]
[[Category:The Captain]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon]]
[[Category:The Last Horizon groups]]
